items.title: qwen-lora-finetune
items.summary: Fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder for code generation on your own dataset using QLoRA. Train on JSONL instruction-response pairs and produce a shareable ~16 MB LoRA adapter.
items.summary_cn: 使用QLoRA对Qwen2.5-Coder进行微调，以便在您自己的数据集上生成代码。培训JSONL指令-响应对，并生产可共享的约16 MB LoRA适配器。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Climax-Heroes-AI
items.summary: A Reinforcement Learning environment that trains AI agents to play Kamen Rider: Climax Heroes (PS2)
items.summary_cn: 强化学习环境，训练人工智能代理玩《假面骑士：高潮英雄》（ PS2 ）
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: ELSA3D: Elastic Semantic Anchoring for Unified 3D Understanding and Generation
items.title_cn: ELSA3D ：用于统一3D理解和生成的弹性语义锚定
items.summary: Unified 3D foundation models aspire to generate 3D assets and reason about them in language within a single backbone, but their text-3D interaction remains largely implicit. Existing methods concatenate text and 3D tokens into a flat sequence and rely on self-attention, collapsing coarse structural ...
items.summary_cn: 统一的3D基础模型渴望在单个骨干中以语言生成3D资产并进行推理，但它们的文本3D交互在很大程度上仍然是隐含的。现有的方法将文本和3D令牌连接成一个平坦的序列，并依赖于自我注意，折叠粗糙的结构...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Graph Convolutional Attention: A Spectral Perspective on Graph Denoising and Diffusion
items.title_cn: 图卷积注意：图去噪和扩散的光谱视角
items.summary: Denoising graphs is a fundamental problem in graph learning and the core operation of graph diffusion models. Attention-based architectures like graph transformers have recently shown promise in denoising graphs. However, our principled understanding of attention-based graph denoising remains limite...
items.summary_cn: 图的去噪是图学习中的一个基本问题，也是图扩散模型的核心操作。基于注意力的架构（如图形变换器）最近在图形去噪方面显示出前景。然而，我们对基于注意力的图去噪的原则性理解仍然有限...
items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，光看参数没用，能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: Rethinking Indic AI from a Lens of Cultural Heritage Preservation
items.title_cn: 从文化遗产保护的角度重新思考印度人工智能
items.summary: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) makes inroads into different parts of the Indian subcontinent, there is significant interest in studying how AI impacts the linguistic and cultural foundations of this civilization. AI is seen as a ''double-edged sword'' where on the one hand, it can enable access and...
items.summary_cn: 随着人工智能（ AI ）进入印度次大陆的不同地区，人们对研究AI如何影响这种文明的语言和文化基础非常感兴趣。人工智能被视为一把“双刃剑” ，一方面，它可以实现访问和...
items.comment: 政策收紧，大厂合规团队又要扩编了，创新空间还剩多少？

items.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
items.title_cn: 热门法国初创公司ZML发布免费产品，以加快对大量人工智能芯片的推断速度
items.summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.
items.summary_cn: 由图灵奖获得者Yann LeCun认可的热门法国人工智能初创公司ZML现已发布ZML/LLMD ，该软件可以降低运行人工智能的成本。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
items.title_cn: 人工智能芯片制造商SambaNova在上一轮大型融资5个月后以110亿美元的估值筹集了10亿美元
items.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
items.summary_cn: 人工智能芯片制造商SambaNova在传闻英特尔试图以约16亿美元的价格收购它几个月后，以110亿美元的估值筹集资金。
items.comment: 政策收紧，大厂合规团队又要扩编了，创新空间还剩多少？

items.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
items.title_cn: Meta刚刚推出了一个新的人工智能生成器Muse Image ，用户已经开始推迟使用他们的照片
items.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.
items.summary_cn: 新的图像生成模型有许多用例，包括广告和装饰，以及基于创作者的机会。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？
